Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 504}I wonder if Kirijo-san will be all right... She's been so depressed lately.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 505}I'm worried too, but we should leave her be for now. Us trying to cheer her up won't help...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 504}Still, it feels so heavy in there that I can't bring myself to talk about anything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 505}Kirijo-san left somewhere. A second-year came by earlier looking for her too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 505}I think her name was Takeba-san. I have no idea where either of them went, though.[n]{f 1 1}
